name: Maelwing
description: King Baelenys' dragon, ridden since long before his own coronation and as feared throughout the realm as the king himself.

name: Jhagar
description: Bonded to Prince Jacaelon. Jhagar is a genuinely unruly beast, hardly an easy dragon to handle — though he settles somewhat more readily for Jace than for anyone else, the product of hours spent drilling commands into him at the Dragonpit rather than any natural affection.

name: Cloudgazer
description: Princess Saera's dragon, storm-grey and unusually gentle. She retreats to his back whenever the Red Keep grows too loud.

name: Bayle
description: Prince Gaelor's dragon, flown into the Reach during the campaign that ended in the Oldtown Massacre. Bayle has a vicious temper — burning birds, beetles, and anything else that moves before him — yet turns remarkably compliant and well-behaved around his own rider, as though the violence is simply another form of affection.

name: Jadefyre
description: Hatched in Visenor's clutch of three and named by him before his flight from King's Landing. The sole hatchling to survive, Jadefyre was gifted to Maela by royal decree after Visenor's disappearance.

name: Boneskin
traits: Wings Thin Enough to Show the Bone Beneath
Avoids Humans by Choice, Not Fear
description: A wild dragon Visenor found roosting alone in a cave in Dorne's Red Mountains. Small and lean rather than malnourished, Boneskin eats little and shuns human contact out of what maesters believe is a rare, near-human intelligence rather than aggression. After days of patient contact he accepted Visenor's presence and let himself be touched, but Visenor has not yet attempted to ride him.

name: Unnamed hatchling
description: One of two hatchlings from Visenor's clutch of three. Died of grotesque birth defects within days of hatching, never named.

name: Unnamed hatchling
description: The second of two hatchlings from Visenor's clutch of three to die of grotesque birth defects, leaving only Jadefyre alive.
